label: About
title: About Wool Current Trial Ground
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 29 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 6 source windows around This 75-Acre Farm Mines Bitcoin With Sheep and Iasos - Angelic Music [1978], plus 4 more. A source image from mtcubacenter.org helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Wool Current Trial Ground: A low, close field plate: dense native leaves press forward like a living interface, with rough bark-carbon texture on one side and measured trial lanes cutting pale breathing space through the green. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 6 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against rough cream-and-black bed rim, dark solar-panel grid slit, and tan perforated seed strips.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
